title: Memento Mori
subtitle: "Remember you must die." Visualize your life, week by week.

form.dobHint: On mobile, use the format DD/MM/YYYY.

error.noDob: Please enter your date of birth.
error.invalidDob: Please enter a valid date of birth.
error.futureDob: Date of birth cannot be in the future.

items.text: Life is not short, but we waste a lot of it.
items.author: Seneca

items.text: Waste no more time arguing what a good person should be. Be one.
items.author: Marcus Aurelius

items.text: It is not things that disturb people, but their judgments about those things.
items.author: Epictetus

items.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
items.author: Marcus Aurelius

items.text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
items.author: Seneca

items.text: You have power over your mind, not over external events.
items.author: Marcus Aurelius

items.text: While we postpone, life passes by.
items.author: Seneca

items.text: Each day is a whole life.
items.author: Seneca

notifications.testError: Could not send a test notification: {{error}}
notifications.missingSubscription: No push subscription found. Enable notifications first.

footer: Each dot is one week. Each row is one year.
